name: Shade Net 50% (3×3 m)
desc: UV-stabilised green net · cuts summer heat by 8 °C · protects leafy greens
how: Stretch over frame or tie to walls. Remove in monsoon.

name: Insect/Bird Net Fine Mesh (3×3 m)
desc: 40-mesh net keeps out fruit flies, birds, squirrels · light & breathable
how: Cover before flowering. Lift for pollination if needed.

name: Jute Mulch Sheet (5×3 ft, 3 sheets)
desc: Biodegradable jute mulch · holds moisture, blocks weeds, decomposes into compost
how: Lay around base. Slit for plant stems.

name: Frost Cover / Plant Blanket (2×3 m)
desc: Breathable fleece cover for North Indian winter · 4 °C frost protection
how: Drape loosely. Remove on sunny days.
